name: Deck Compare – MTG
description: Compare MTG decklists side by side across Moxfield, MTGGoldfish, Archidekt, mtgtop8, Magic-Ville & mtgdecks.net.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src https://api2.moxfield.com https://archidekt.com https://www.mtgtop8.com https://www.mtggoldfish.com https://api.scryfall.com https://cards.scryfall.io https://www.magic-ville.com https://mtgdecks.net https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; font-src https://fonts.googleapis.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; style-src 'self' https://fonts.googleapis.com 'unsafe-inline'; img-src 'self' data:;
